content:
flowchart TD
    A["Research Priorities for IF in Metabolic Syndrome"] --> B["1 Long-duration pragmatic trials >12 months"]
    A --> C["2 Head-to-head vs continuous energy restriction"]
    A --> D["3 Head-to-head vs pharmacotherapy"]
    A --> E["4 Population-scale implementation studies"]
    B --> B1["Durability and long-term safety"]
    C --> C1["Comparative effectiveness"]
    D --> D1["Positioning vs GLP-1 and others"]
    E --> E1["WHO-scale behavioral deployment 12"]
    F["Current retrieved evidence anchors"] --> G["Short-term IER meta-analysis 3"]
    F --> H["12h TRE pragmatic RCT 10"]
